PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Mitchell for Robert Penne.

The Court reviewed the declarations of Mr. Levy and Ms. Rasch and concluded that the original will was lost, not destroyed with intent to revoke. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted. The bond was set at $200,000.00.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Continued To Mar-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
